calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing On The Filing Of The Bond
Off Calendar Aug-18-2021 Off Calendar

Petition For Appointment Of Peter J Prongos And Catherine M. Giouzelis As General Successor Co-Trustees
Off Calendar Jul-22-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Thomas Nuris, via ZOOM, for Peter Prongos, Petitioner.

The court advises counsel that the only question being contemplated by the court is whether to require a bond or waive bond if the court grants the petition. Counsel provides oral testimony in support of waiving the bond but will comply with any court order.
After additional discussion, and contemplation by the court on the bond issue, counsel is advised that bond in the amount of $1,200,000 will be required.

The Petition for Appointment, etc., is submitted with the intent to grant.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

Petition For Appointment Of Peter J Prongos And Catherine M. Giouzelis As General Successor Co-Trustees
